title: claytonia californica
intro: Claytonia californica, also known as California miner's lettuce or California purslane, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the family Portulacaceae. It is rich in vitamins A, C, and E, as well as minerals like calcium, iron, and potassium, making it a valuable medicinal herb. The plant has been traditionally used to treat a variety of health issues, including digestive problems, inflammation, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Claytonia californica can be prepared as an herbal remedy through teas, infusions, and salves, making it a popular choice among herbalists and natural health practitioners.
